mapper.sql: o.id, o.product_id, o.buyer_id, o.seller_id, o.order_status, o.create_time, o.finish_time, p.title AS product_title, p.price AS product_price, (SELECT image_url FROM product_image pi WHERE pi.product_id = p.id ORDER BY pi.id LIMIT 1) AS product_image_url, buyer.username AS buyer_name, seller.username AS seller_name, EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM review r WHERE r.order_id = o.id) AS reviewed
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_info(product_id, buyer_id, seller_id, order_status, create_time) VALUES(#{productId}, #{buyerId}, #{sellerId}, #{orderStatus}, now())
mapper.select: SELECT FROM order_info o LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN sys_user buyer ON o.buyer_id = buyer.id LEFT JOIN sys_user seller ON o.seller_id = seller.id WHERE o.id = #{id}

SELECT FROM order_info o LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN sys_user buyer ON o.buyer_id = buyer.id LEFT JOIN sys_user seller ON o.seller_id = seller.id WHERE o.product_id = #{productId} AND o.order_status IN ('WAIT_CONFIRM', 'TRADING') ORDER BY o.create_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM order_info o LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN sys_user buyer ON o.buyer_id = buyer.id LEFT JOIN sys_user seller ON o.seller_id = seller.id WHERE o.buyer_id = #{buyerId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC

SELECT FROM order_info o LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN sys_user buyer ON o.buyer_id = buyer.id LEFT JOIN sys_user seller ON o.seller_id = seller.id WHERE o.seller_id = #{sellerId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC

SELECT FROM order_info o LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN sys_user buyer ON o.buyer_id = buyer.id LEFT JOIN sys_user seller ON o.seller_id = seller.id ORDER BY o.create_time DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE order_info SET order_status = #{orderStatus}, finish_time = CASE WHEN #{finish} THEN now() ELSE finish_time END WHERE id = #{id}
